tony-sobriety.title: The System
tony-sobriety.description: Tony's alcohol use oscillates. Right now it's managed. It won't stay that way.

steve-displacement.title: Wrong Century
steve-displacement.description: Steve's temporal displacement keeps resurfacing in unexpected contexts. He hasn't grieved the lost world.

frank-mission-end.title: What's Underneath
frank-mission-end.description: The mission cannot end because ending it means addressing what's underneath. Frank knows this. He keeps going anyway.

jessica-kilgrave.title: Still There
jessica-kilgrave.description: Kilgrave is never fully gone. Something will surface a trigger. When it does, the alcohol escalates before she notices.

sam-riley.title: His Name Was Riley
sam-riley.description: Sam helps everyone. Nobody asks about Riley. The grief is accessible if someone ever pokes it. Nobody does.

bucky-identity.title: Who Without
bucky-identity.description: Who is Bucky independent of Steve, of HYDRA, of the arm. The question has no current answer.

peter-abandonment.title: Parker Luck
peter-abandonment.description: Every relationship is shaped by the fear that it will end badly. It usually does. Peter makes sure of it.

reed-ben-guilt.title: The Cost of the Calculation
reed-ben-guilt.description: Ben has forgiven Reed. Reed has not forgiven Reed. Ben carries Reed's guilt so Reed can function. This has a cost.

victor-mother.title: Cynthia
victor-mother.description: Victor has never stopped trying to retrieve his mother from Hell. He never will. This is the one thing that bypasses the armor.

victor-reed-gap.title: What He Got to Be
victor-reed-gap.description: Victor is jealous not of what Reed has but of what Reed is — completely, without armor. Reed doesn't know this is the thing.
